# Visual Builder Studio

Manage OCI Visual Builder Studio instances from Kubernetes with a reviewed controller-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `vbsinst` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-vbsinst-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-vbsinst:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-vbsinst-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to VbsInstance while the service-local work-request helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses service-SDK work requests for create, update, and delete, and binds only on exact `compartmentId` plus immutable `name`.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
